description:
100% Open Source Toolkit for Large Language Models: Train, Tune, Chat on your own Machine

Transformer Lab is a free, open-source LLM workspace that you can run on your own computer. It is designed to go beyond what most modern open LLM applications allow. Using Transformer Lab you can easily finetune, evaluate, export and test LLMs across different inference engines and platforms.
This is a patch release with some helpful features and bug fixes including:
- training with chat templates: automatically apply chat templates when training on datasets of conversations
- VLM training: use combined image and text datasets on LoRA finetunes
- A number of UI improvements to Training, Generate and Evaluation modals
- fix for docker image so llama.cpp plugin works properly
- plus many more stability and UI fixes
Detailed Log
- Make export page look exactly like evals and generate by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/649
- Fix Close button on Workflow Runs Output Modal by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/636
- Fixed Workflow runs Training Jobs Streaming by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/634
- Add chat column into config by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/643
- Fix ModelProviderWidget to have an option to also specify loader plugin by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/652
- Fix editing task names in Train and Evaluate by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/647
- Include evaluation steps in GEval Widget by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/658
- Add Progress Bar to Workflow Runs by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/656
- Make Workflow JSON Editable in UI by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/666
- Use the job streaming route for train outputs too by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/668
- Fix recipe install logic to improve performance for plugins and dataset install by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/665
- Fix selection of tasks with duplicate names and set default mode as TRAIN by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/663
- Fix system message reset by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/638
- Fix blank system message when starting a model by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/669
- Add/activate-recipes-for-everyone by @aliasaria in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/601
- Remove Training Recipes from the App by @aliasaria in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/660
- Fix Workflow JSON in dark mode by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/671
- Workflows can only add tasks within experiment by @aahaanmaini in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/648
- Show Apply Chat Template toggle only for specific plugin types by @mina-parham in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/657
- Fix Editing, Saving on TRAIN, EVAL and GENERATE by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/674
Full Changelog: https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/compare/v0.20.1...v0.20.2
